queries.text:
OTELMetrics
| where MetricName in ('flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_numRecordsSend', 'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_recordsSent')
| where Timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| summarize Value=max(MetricValue) by Timestamp=bin(Timestamp, 15s), MetricName
| order by Timestamp asc

OTELMetrics
| where MetricName in ('flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_bytesSent', 'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_numBytesSend')
| where Timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| summarize Value=max(MetricValue) by Timestamp=bin(Timestamp, 15s), MetricName
| order by Timestamp asc

OTELMetrics
| where MetricName in ('flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_successfullyIngested', 'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_successfullyQueued', 'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_failedIngestions', 'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_partialSucceededIngestions', 'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_ingestionSucceeded', 'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_ingestionFailed')
| where Timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| extend Series = case(
    MetricName has_any ('successfullyIngested', 'successfullyQueued', 'ingestionSucceeded'), 'Successes',
    MetricName has_any ('fail', 'Failed', 'failedIngestions'), 'Failures',
    'Partial')
| summarize Value=max(MetricValue) by Timestamp=bin(Timestamp, 15s), Series
| order by Timestamp asc

OTELMetrics
| where MetricName == 'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_blobsUploaded'
| where Timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| summarize Value=max(MetricValue) by Timestamp=bin(Timestamp, 15s)
| order by Timestamp asc

OTELMetrics
| where MetricName startswith 'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_ingestionLatencyMs'
| where Timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| extend Stat = extract('ingestionLatencyMs[._](.*)', 1, MetricName)
| where isnotempty(Stat)
| extend Label = case(
    Stat == '0.5', 'p50',
    Stat == '0.75', 'p75',
    Stat == '0.95', 'p95',
    Stat == '0.99', 'p99',
    Stat == '0.999', 'p999',
    Stat == 'count', 'count',
    Stat == 'Mean' or Stat == 'mean', 'mean',
    Stat == 'Median' or Stat == 'median', 'p50',
    Stat)
| where Label !in ('count')
| summarize Value=max(MetricValue) by Timestamp=bin(Timestamp, 15s), Label
| order by Timestamp asc

OTELMetrics
| where MetricName == 'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_currentSendTime'
| where Timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| summarize Value=max(MetricValue) by Timestamp=bin(Timestamp, 15s)
| order by Timestamp asc

OTELMetrics
| where MetricName startswith 'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_'
| where Timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| summarize LastUpdated=max(Timestamp), Value=max(MetricValue) by MetricName
| order by MetricName asc

OTELMetrics
| where MetricName in ('flink_jobmanager_job_numberOfCompletedCheckpoints', 'flink_jobmanager_job_numberOfFailedCheckpoints')
| where Timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| extend Series = iff(MetricName has 'Completed', 'Completed', 'Failed')
| summarize Value=max(MetricValue) by Timestamp=bin(Timestamp, 15s), Series
| order by Timestamp asc

OTELMetrics
| where MetricName == 'flink_jobmanager_job_lastCheckpointDuration'
| where Timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| summarize Value=max(MetricValue) by Timestamp=bin(Timestamp, 15s)
| order by Timestamp asc

OTELMetrics
| where MetricName == 'flink_jobmanager_job_uptime'
| where Timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| top 1 by Timestamp desc
| project Uptime=format_timespan(totimespan(MetricValue * 10000), 'dd.hh:mm:ss')

OTELMetrics
| where Timestamp between (_startTime .. _endTime)
| where MetricName in (
    'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_numRecordsSend',
    'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_bytesSent',
    'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_successfullyIngested',
    'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_successfullyQueued',
    'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_failedIngestions',
    'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_blobsUploaded',
    'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_ingestionSucceeded',
    'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_ingestionFailed'
)
| summarize LastUpdated=max(Timestamp), Value=max(MetricValue) by MetricName
| project Metric=replace_string(replace_string(MetricName, 'flink_taskmanager_job_task_operator_', ''), '_', ' '), Value, LastUpdated
